channel.title: NASJJ Mary, MUM Siddique, S Pradhan, V Jayaprakash, C James | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NASJJ Mary, MUM Siddique, S Pradhan, V Jayaprakash, C James

image.title: NASJJ Mary, MUM Siddique, S Pradhan, V Jayaprakash, C James

item.title: Quantum chemical insight into molecular structure, NBO analysis of the hydrogen-bonded interactions, spectroscopic (FT-IR, FT-Raman), drug likeness and molecular docking of the novel anti COVID-19 molecule 2-[(4,6-diaminopyrimidin-2-yl)sulfanyl]-N-(4-fluorophenyl)acetamide - dimer.
